title: How to create onboarding for new clients

posts.author: Tobiashk (Tobias Kristensen)
posts.cookedHtml:
For a digital marketing agency…

We need a board for onboarding process, what is the best way to create a board that can automate this?
I have seen boards with a kind of “standard” SEO task for a period of 6 month, is it possible to then automate these tasks to every new client?

Cheers,

posts.author: LillyBates (Lilly)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s great to see that you’re planning an automated onboarding process for your digital marketing agency.

posts.author: mmcarteeri (Julia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Great question about automating the onboarding process! Yes, you can absolutely set up a template board for SEO tasks that can be cloned for each new client. Many project management platforms offer this feature. Then you can use automations to assign tasks as soon as a new client is onboarded.
For SEO tasks specifically, you might want to integrate a tool that can help you analyze SEO data. It’s a robust tool that can offer valuable insights for each of your client’s SEO strategies.
Since this thread is a year old, how has your onboarding process evolved? Would love to hear an update!

posts.author: rehan.abdul (Rehan AQ | monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Not possible, the workaround for that is to create template for Onboarding process. Then you can setup automation when new client is in onboard stage automatically generate board for Client. After that if you think you need to change tasks or add new tasks , you can change in template or board generated.
